Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Planner.PlanLearningObjective

Represents the learning objective for plan.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
RepositoryId

Identifier of the learning objective inside the repository. Unique globally for all sites. Null means that learning objective is not from the repository.

 integer

None.
Id

The learning objective identifier. Unique in scope of a site (itslearning customer).

 integer

None.
Title

The learning objective title.

 string

None.
Description

The learning objective description.

 string

None.
